repo.title: GitHub - assistant-ui/assistant-ui: Typescript/React Library for AI Chat💬🚀 · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: assistant-ui
manifest_entry.focus: tool-call UX and structured AI chat
teaches: how to make AI interactions feel structured and enterprise-grade
avoid: over-designing chat UI while neglecting the surrounding product
assuming a chat library defines the full UX strategy
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: Strong source for the mechanics of serious AI chat and tool interaction patterns.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: AI credibility increases when messages, tools, and outputs belong to one coherent system.
